text: Machine learning is a subset of artificial intelligence that enables systems to learn from data.
Deep learning uses neural networks with multiple layers to process complex patterns.
Natural language processing helps computers understand and generate human language.
Transformers are neural network architectures that revolutionized NLP tasks.
BERT is a pre-trained transformer model for bidirectional language understanding.
GPT models use autoregressive training for language generation and understanding.
Attention mechanisms allow models to focus on relevant parts of input data.
Embeddings represent words or documents as dense vectors in high-dimensional space.
Tokenization breaks text into smaller units like words or subwords for processing.
Transfer learning reuses knowledge from one task to improve performance on another.
